name: InfluxDB
description: Validates access to the InfluxDB 3 instance and basic metadata extraction.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can properly reach the InfluxDB 3 /health endpoint and authenticate with the given credentials.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to InfluxDB 3, please validate the host and port.

steps.name: GetDatabases
steps.description: List all the databases available to the user.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch databases, please validate if the token has enough privilege to fetch databases.
